data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: MFA implementation for enhanced account security.
data.technical_spec: Combines passwords with secondary code sent to user devices.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit between users and Netflix services.
data.technical_spec: Employs SSL/TLS to protect streaming and browsing sessions.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Defensive measures against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS Shield and custom DDoS prevention techniques.

data.title: Threat Detection and Response
data.description: Proactive threat monitoring and incident response.
data.technical_spec: Uses custom tools and third-party integrations for threat intelligence.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent audits to identify vulnerabilities and enforce security policies.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing and automated scans to find security gaps.
